answer: No, there is no free tier for Smartsheet API access. Access to the Smartsheet API is restricted to users on Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plans. While Smartsheet offers a general free plan for project management and free trials for new users, these do not include the permissions required to use the API. To integrate, you must have a qualifying paid plan and generate an API access token via your account's Personal Settings. The base URL for API requests is `https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0`.
